name: Sistema Teleférico Mukumbarí
records: Longest aerial tramway in the world
Highest aerial tramway in the world (Pico Espejo at 4,765 m)
notes: Four-segment cable car system through Sierra Nevada National Park. Closed 2008-2016 for full reconstruction. Closed again 2020-2022 for maintenance; all stations operational again by January 2023.
